execute_task.description: execute_task(job) - Main entry point called by central execution engine. Resolves dynamic content, routes to task handler by task_type. Returns {status, message}.

resolve_content.description: resolve_content(payload) - Fetches live data via FETCH_DATA_REGISTRY and replaces {{variable}} templates in all string fields.

FETCH_DATA_REGISTRY.description: FETCH_DATA_REGISTRY - Maps variable names (btc_price, eth_price, weather, news) to fetch functions. AI adds new entries here.

_deep_replace.description: _deep_replace(obj, resolved) - Recursively replaces {{key}} in all string/dict/list values.

_send_telegram.description: _send_telegram(payload) - Send message via Telegram Bot API sendMessage. Requires TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN and chat_id in payload.

_send_discord.description: _send_discord(payload) - Send message via Discord webhook. Requires webhook_url in payload.

_send_email.description: _send_email(payload) - Send email via SMTP. Requires SMTP_* in .env and 'to' in payload.

_call_api.description: _call_api(payload) - HTTP request to any URL. Method, headers, body from payload.

_execute_trade.description: _execute_trade(payload) - Paper trade placeholder (safe, no real execution).

_fetch_crypto.description: _fetch_crypto(coin) - Fetches crypto price via api_client.get_crypto_price(), returns formatted string.

_fetch_weather.description: _fetch_weather() - Fetches weather via api_client.get_weather(), returns formatted string.

_fetch_news.description: _fetch_news() - Fetches top stories via api_client.get_news(), returns pipe-separated titles.

job_manager.create.description: job_manager.create(job_type, schedule_value, task_type, payload) - Create new job via POST /api/scheduler/projects/{id}/jobs

job_manager.list_jobs.description: job_manager.list_jobs() - List all jobs for this project via GET /api/scheduler/projects/{id}/jobs

job_manager.pause.description: job_manager.pause(job_id) - Pause an active job via POST /api/scheduler/jobs/{id}/pause

job_manager.resume.description: job_manager.resume(job_id) - Resume a paused job via POST /api/scheduler/jobs/{id}/resume

job_manager.run_now.description: job_manager.run_now(job_id) - Trigger job immediately via POST /api/scheduler/jobs/{id}/run

job_manager.get_logs.description: job_manager.get_logs(job_id) - Get execution logs via GET /api/scheduler/jobs/{id}/logs

fetch_json.description: fetch_json(url, params, timeout) - Generic JSON fetcher for public APIs with error handling.

safe_get.description: safe_get(data, *keys, default) - Safely get nested dictionary value.

get_crypto_price.description: get_crypto_price(coin_id, currency) - Fetch crypto price from CoinGecko API.

get_weather.description: get_weather(latitude, longitude) - Fetch weather from Open-Meteo API.

get_news.description: get_news(query, page) - Fetch top stories from Hacker News API.

ScrapeConfig.description: ScrapeConfig - Dataclass describing config-driven scraping settings.

WebScraper.description: WebScraper - Base class for CDP navigation, extraction, and pagination.

scrape_url.description: scrape_url(url, config) - Standalone scraping helper for one-off jobs.

register_scraper.description: register_scraper(name, scraper_class) - Registers custom scraper implementation.

get_scraper.description: get_scraper(name, config) - Instantiates registered scraper by name.
